race.comment: The penny has dropped for BURLINGTON ARCADE (1) who has strung back-to-back wins together this campaign with Wiggins being in the irons for both victories. Looks the one they all have to run down. MISTER DOOBEE (3) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for this contest. Expect a strong run while fresh. VEGAMEISTER (5) boasts a win over this track and trip and gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim. Comes here with definite top-three claims. TARONG (4) is first-up but has tuned up for this with a recent trial and may earn some minor money. VERY GOOD (9) has posted two victories in lesser grade and has earned her shot at this level now.
